text:
is a 143-page merchandise catalog released by Kadokawa Shoten on 25 December 1997. It lists a multitude of Evangelion-related licensed merchandising that had been released since up to the point of release of the book.

Table of Contents

Part 1: Arcade related goods.
Part 2: Plastic models, Garage Kits and Hobby related goods.
Part 3: List of video & CDs, CD-ROMs, games and books.
Part 4: Character goods.
Part 5: Trading cards
Part 6: Limited items and not-for-sale items not available to the general public.

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4048528688
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4048528689
